Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product in the catalog.

description.description: A rich HTML description of the product.

category.description: The category the product belongs to.

imageUrls.description: URLs of the product images. The first one is the main image.

businessId.description: The ID of the business this product belongs to.

Business.title: Business
Business.description: Represents a business using the platform to manage their online presence.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Business entity.

adminEmail.description: The email of the business administrator.

address.description: The physical address of the business.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the business.

websiteUrl.description: The website URL of the business.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile, linking their auth UID to their business.

businessId.description: The ID of the business this user belongs to.

GoogleMyBusinessProfile.title: GoogleMyBusinessProfile
GoogleMyBusinessProfile.description: Represents a Google My Business profile associated with a business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GoogleMyBusinessProfile entity.

primaryCategory.description: The primary category of the business on Google My Business.

additionalCategories.description: Additional categories associated with the business.

profileUrl.description: URL of the business's Google My Business profile.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Represents a customer review for a business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

authorName.description: The name of the review author.

rating.description: The rating given by the customer (e.g., 1 to 5 stars).

comment.description: The text content of the review.

date.description: The date the review was submitted.

isFiltered.description: Indicates whether the review was filtered internally (e.g., 1-4 stars).

internalFeedbackId.description: Reference to InternalFeedback. (Relationship: InternalFeedback 1:1 Review).  Only populated if review is filtered.

InternalFeedback.title: InternalFeedback
InternalFeedback.description: Represents internal feedback collected from customers who left a negative review.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InternalFeedback entity.

businessId.description: The ID of the business this feedback belongs to.

name.description: The name of the customer providing feedback.

email.description: The email address of the customer providing feedback.

message.description: The message provided by the customer.

AutomatedPost.title: AutomatedPost
AutomatedPost.description: Represents an automated post scheduled for a Google My Business profile.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AutomatedPost entity.

scheduledDate.description: The date and time the post is scheduled to be published.

status.description: The status of the post (e.g., scheduled, published, failed).

LandingPage.title: LandingPage
LandingPage.description: Represents a landing page created for a business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LandingPage entity.

title.description: The title of the landing page.

content.description: The HTML or markdown content of the landing page.

design.description: JSON data representing the design and layout of the landing page.

url.description: The URL of the landing page.

Subscription.title: Subscription
Subscription.description: Represents a subscription plan for a business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Subscription entity.

name.description: The name of the subscription plan (e.g., Basic, Premium).

price.description: The price of the subscription plan.

features.description: A list of features included in the subscription plan.

PaymentSettings.title: PaymentSettings
PaymentSettings.description: Stores the payment method configurations for a business.

PaymentMethod.title: PaymentMethod
PaymentMethod.description: Defines the structure for QR-based payment methods.

/products/{productId}.description: Stores all products for all businesses. Security rules will enforce that a business can only access its own products.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile information, linking auth ID to business ID. Users can read their own profile.

/businesses/{businessId}.description: Stores business information.  Root collection for all business-related data. Businesses can manage their Google My Business profiles, landing pages, etc.

/businesses/{businessId}/contactForms/{f.description: Stores the configuration for a business's contact form.

/businesses/{businessId}/contactSubmissi.description: Stores submissions from the public contact form.

/googleMyBusinessProfiles/{googleMyBusin.description: Stores Google My Business profile information. Includes the businessId to ensure authorization independence for access control.

Stores customer reviews for a Google My Business profile.  Located as a subcollection to ensure efficient querying of reviews associated with a profile.  Includes fields for filtering (isFiltered) and internal feedback.

/internalFeedback/{internalFeedbackId}.description: Stores internal feedback collected from customers who left negative reviews. Now a root collection for simplified querying.

/googleMyBusinessProfiles/{googleMyBusin.description: Stores automated posts scheduled for a Google My Business profile. Located as a subcollection to ensure efficient querying of posts associated with a profile.

/businesses/{businessId}/landingPages/{l.description: Stores landing pages created for a business. Located as a subcollection to ensure efficient querying of landing pages associated with a business.

/paymentSettings/{userId}.description: Stores payment settings for a user. The settings for the super admin (ID: DzH9Kc6eYqOih5Y705ebM0SzfZf2) are public-read for the catalog, while all other user settings are private.
